description_long: A rectangular wooden planter box contains three stylized white-petaled flowers with yellow centers, each supported by green stems and surrounded by angular green leaves. The planter is constructed from two horizontal planks on each side, with visible end joints and a slightly raised rim. The flowers are evenly spaced, with the central flower standing taller than the two flanking it. The petals are broad, flat, and arranged radially around the yellow disc-like centers, giving a geometric, almost cartoonish appearance. The leaves are lanceolate and sharply angled, emerging from the base of each stem. The overall look is clean and minimalistic, suitable for urban decorative use on sidewalks, balconies, or public parks.
description: A rectangular wooden planter box holds three stylized white flowers with yellow centers and green leaves. The flowers are evenly spaced and have a geometric, cartoon-like appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing all three flowers, with the central flower most prominent and the planter's horizontal planks clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the planter and the alignment of the flowers, with the petals and leaves overlapping in perspective.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backs of the flowers and the planter's structure, with the flowers' stems and leaves more visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the flowers from a different angle, emphasizing the staggered heights and the planter's end joints.
attribute_petal_arrangement: The petals are arranged in a radial configuration around the yellow center, with each flower displaying a single whorl of non-overlapping, symmetrically spaced petals.
